src: One outcome of this ‘natural’ affinity was that newspaper editorial offices and political parties were often populated by the same people; newspapers were sometimes funded by political parties and, in line with their ‘freedom to make a political choice’, they espoused certain political ideologies.
mt: "这个所谓的‘自然’亲缘关系的一个结果是，报纸编辑部和政治党派经常由同一群人组成；报纸有时由政治党派资助，并且在他们的‘政治选择自由’的名义下，宣扬了一些特定的政治意识形态。"

src: It seeks to give fair coverage to all political viewpoints and to treat all views with a degree of respect not always found in other serious newspapers.
mt: 它旨在为所有政治观点提供公平的覆盖，并且对所有观点都给予一种通常在其他严肃报纸中不常见的尊重。

src: In a separate development, British Aerospace and Thomson CSF of France confirmed they were considering making a joint offer for Ferranti.
mt: 在一个分开的发展中，英国航空航天公司和法国的索尼公司（Thomson CSF）确认他们正在考虑联合提出一个关于费朗提（Ferranti）的报价。

src: Elite theory accounts of state organization are developed and detailed, and we first review five aspects where the approach has made a distinctive contribution: the role of political leaderships in liberal democracies, the predominance of bureaucracies in shaping policy-making, the reasons for fragmentation (or centralization) of governmental tiers and sectors, the role of law, and the strong policy connections between government activities and major economic interests.
mt: 精英理论对国家组织的论述是发展和详细的，我们首先审查五个方面，精英理论在其中做出了独特的贡献：自由民主国家中的政治领导层的作用、行政机关在政策制定中的主导地位、政府层级和部门的分散化（或集中化）原因、法律的作用，以及政府活动与主要经济利益之间的强烈政策联系。

src: In the eighteen months since Mrs Thatcher had taken up employment at Dickins and Jones, the mood of the Party had perceptibly changed for the better, the great bulk of the membership having transferred its loyalty smoothly from the old Leader to the new.
mt: 自从玛格丽特·撒切尔女士在迪金斯和琼斯公司工作了18个月以来，党派的气氛明显改善了，许多成员在无缝地转移了对旧领导人的忠诚，转而支持新领导。

src: There was an intensified sense of a gap between present and past, and of the need to find a way of bridging it which would make possible an adequate statement of belief for the present day.
mt: "There was an intensified sense of a gap between present and past, and of the need to find a way of bridging it which would make possible an adequate statement of belief for the present day." 有一种加剧的感觉，感受到过去与现在之间的鸿沟，以及找到一种方式来桥接它，使得能够为当下提供一个适当的信仰陈述。

src: The essence of regulation is a conception that law is the means by which some notion of the public good is to take precedence over narrow economic interests.
mt: "规制的本质是一个概念，即法律是某种公众利益的先决条件，优先于狭隘的经济利益。"

src: It makes particular use of the work of scholars who have conducted ethnographic analyses of discretionary behaviour in legal settings (e.g. Cicourel, 1968; Emerson, 1969; Manning, 1977; Reiss, 1971; Ross, 1970; Skolnick, 1966; Sudnow, 1965).
mt: 这段文字特别利用了那些在法律环境中进行民族志分析的学者们的工作（例如：Cicourel, 1968; Emerson, 1969; Manning, 1977; Reiss, 1971; Ross, 1970; Skolnick, 1966; Sudnow, 1965）。

src: It seemed unlikely that anyone so competent as Dora would make such an elementary mistake, but under that fierce gaze Melissa felt bound to make some suggestion, however implausible.
mt: "似乎不太可能有人像Dora这样有能力的人会犯出这样一个基本错误，但在Melissa面前那炽热的目光下，她感到必须提出一些不太可能的建议。"

src: He shook his head and made a movement with his hand, as if warding off some invisible threat.
mt: 他摇了摇头，做了一个手势，好像在驱赶某种看不见的威胁。

src: ‘It's very good of you to include me,’ she said when she, Iris and Jack were installed at a table, sipping apéritifs and making a show of studying the menu.
mt: "‘很高兴你邀请我,’ 她说，当她、伊丽莎白和杰克被安排在桌子上，品尝开胃菜并显得在研究菜单时。" (Note: The translation uses "伊丽莎白" as a common English name for Iris, and "开胃菜" as a general term for apéritifs. The idiomatic expression "品尝开胃菜" is used to convey the act of sipping apéritifs.)

src: Madame Delon made no comment.
mt: 玛德琳·德隆没有发表任何评论。

src: He went to the supermarket to do some shopping for Juliette.
mt: 他去超市买些Juliette的购物。

src: As James in La Sylphide, Hubbe gave a performance that rivalled memories of the very best in this part.
mt: "在《仙女》中的詹姆斯，哈布比的表演与记忆中最好的部分的最佳表演相媲美。"

src: Ask me a question and engage me in conversation or make a statement that applies to me.
mt: 请问一个问题让我参与对话，或者说出对我有意义的陈述。

src: One of the disability lobby's persistent fears is that people will be pushed off the invalidity benefit into disability working allowance if they can do some work.
mt: "残疾游说团的一个持久的恐惧是，如果有人能做一些工作，他们会被推向残疾工作津贴而不是残疾福利。"

src: Oh yes but but but what they're doing now is all the erm, they did the presentation to the manufacturing side,
mt: "Oh yes, but but but, 他们现在在做什么？他们给制造部门做了一个演示吧？"

src: I think steel balls are But you see you can do a display on your table can't you
mt: 我认为钢球是个不错的选择，但你看，你可以在桌子上展示它们，对吗？

src: You'll do the presentation of the award.
mt: 你会做颁奖演讲。

src: If this happens the scab may bounce about with great speed and energy within the turret and may do as much damage as if the shell had actually penetrated.
mt: 如果这发生了，疤痕可能在炮塔内以极大的速度和能量跳跃，并可能造成与实际穿透相同的损害。

src: During the war, when we were doing research on strong plastics, Professor Charles Gurney used to recite this little ditty to me nearly every day and I found it depressing because wood was in fact a better material for making aeroplanes than the plastics which we could then produce.
mt: 在战争期间，当我们在研究强度高的塑料时，教授查尔斯·古雷常常向我朗诵这首小诗，每天几乎都在，我发现这让人很沮丧，因为实际上木材比我们可以生产的塑料更适合制造飞机。

src: Swimwear gives rise to vulnerability.
mt: 游泳衣带来脆弱性。

src: My father just turned round I've had enough of it if Terry's not going to do the estimate he passes them on to Brian.
mt: 我的父亲刚刚转过身，我已经厌倦了，如果Terry不打算做估算，他就把它们交给Brian。

src: Your sick parent must be mentally fit to make this decision of her own free will, and it does not rob her of the right to make her own decisions as to the spending of her money or her free access to it.
mt: 你的生病的父母必须在精神上健全才能做出这个决定是她自己的自由意志的决定，并不剥夺她决定如何花她的钱或她对其自由访问的权利。

src: The only people who make a choice today are the ones with self-inflicted wounds, and they get shot for it.
mt: 今天选择的人只有那些自我伤害的人，他们为此付出了代价。

src: In pursuance of his objectives, Ernest Bevin took the lead in negotiating a cooperative arrangement with France and the Low Countries.
mt: 为了实现他的目标，埃尔斯伯里·贝文在与法国和低地国家协商达成合作安排方面发挥了领导作用。

src: Owen took no notice.
mt: 欧文不理会。

src: ‘And you took no action.’
mt: “‘你没有采取任何行动。’”

src: So how did Yukawa dare to make such a revolutionary proposal?
mt: "So how did Yukawa dare to make such a revolutionary proposal?" 所以，为什么 Yukawa 会敢提出这样一项革命性的提案？

src: Such clauses have no effect on the primary liability to the third party for the death or personal injury he has suffered.
mt: "这些条款对第三方因其死亡或受伤而承担的主要责任没有任何影响。"

src: Apparently it is a big cut, but not so deep that it has done any irrevocable damage, at least that's the impression I got.
mt: 显然这是一种大切，但不至于造成任何无法逆转的损害，这才是我所感受到的印象。

src: The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) originally made a tenfold gain over analogue a requirement.
mt: 联邦通信委员会（FCC）最初要求比模拟器更高的十倍收益。

src: When, in 1987, the EPA did a laborious review of the relative seriousness of America's environmental problems, it ranked old hazardous-waste sites below 30 others.
mt: 在1987年，EPA在美国环境问题的严重程度上进行了艰苦的审查，并将老旧危险废物场排在了其他30个之后。

src: In making this request he is echoing the kind of analysis employed by the Curriculum Development Centre in Australia, where he was Director.
mt: 在提出这个请求时，他在模仿澳大利亚Curriculum Development Centre所采用的那种分析方式，那里的他曾担任总监。

src: Remortgaging is the answer for people who do not want to move, but want to make a change in their finances.
mt: 重新抵押是那些不想搬家，但希望改变财务状况的人们的答案。

src: It is difficult to relate the proposals in the review to prospects for services for elderly people, as although it is entitled ‘Working for Patients’, the Review makes little mention of health care for individuals or particular client groups.
mt: "很难将审查中的提案与为老年人提供服务的前景联系起来，因为尽管标题为‘为患者工作’，审查中对个人或特定客户群体的医疗保健几乎没有提及。"

src: Each researcher must make a personal choice, in the multiplicity of circumstances which now exist.
mt: 每位研究人员必须在现有的多种情况中做出个人选择。

src: The economic separation itself then did profound damage to the world payments and trade systems.
mt: "经济分离本身就对世界的支付和贸易系统造成了深远的损害。"

src: Finally, the new working class had no interest in a separate nation; their natural allies were the workers of Petrograd, Moscow and other cities of the empire.
mt: 终于，新的工人阶级对建立独立国家没有兴趣；他们的自然盟友是彼得格勒、莫斯科和帝国其他城市的工人。

src: Internationalism required that two thoroughly nationalistic and non-socialist movements be given complete support.
mt: 国际主义要求两支完全的民族主义和非社会主义运动获得全面支持。

src: From her reclining position, Mrs Keith still took a controlling interest in the household, but with only Jim in the house and two farmhands in the hut, Tina had become used to being in charge.
mt: 从她躺下的姿势来看，米歇尔·基思仍然对家庭事务保持着控制权，但由于只有詹姆斯在家里，还有两名农工在小屋里，蒂娜已经习惯了掌控。

src: Meantime the band had struck with Noreen's entry music and, taking a deep breath, she stepped out into the lights.
mt: 与此同时，乐队在诺琳的音乐加入后就开始了，深吸一口气，她走进了光圈。

src: And the Aussies cheered, daring the policemen to make a move.
mt: "And the Aussies cheered, daring the policemen to make a move." 中文翻译："澳大利亚人欢呼，挑战警察做出一举之作。"

src: It all made sense, the relationship between non-Aristotelian logic and the banality of the American way of life: you had to take a detached view of the culture; you weren't in love with it and you didn't hate it.
mt: "一切都清楚了，非亚里士多德逻辑与美国生活方式的平庸之间的关系：你必须从文化上保持距离；你不爱它，也不恨它。"

src: Ever since the time of Jean-Jacques Rousseau there has been art whose aim has been the renewal of society, but it has had no effect beyond that of producing testimonials (even if controversial ones) of what we call the ‘real’ world, in contrast perhaps with the unreal world of art.
mt: 自让-雅克·罗尚博以来，艺术一直旨在社会的更新，但它的影响仅限于产生了我们称之为‘真实世界’的证言（即使是有争议的证言），与艺术中所描绘的‘虚幻世界’形成对比。

src: Further, authorisation to give permission may well be outside their terms of reference.
mt: 进一步说，授予许可可能超出了他们的职责范围。

src: We did an interview and, at the whim of my sadistic cameraman, it was agreed that I should be the "victim" .
mt: 我们进行了采访，受我残酷的摄影师的意愿，我们同意我应该是“受害者”。

src: He did his own research before the programme went out.
mt: 他在节目播出之前自己进行了研究。

src: Neurones are of three kinds: in sensory neurones the dendrites make contact with a sensory cell, such as a hair cell in the ear or a light-sensitive cell in the retina; in motor neurones, the axons make contact with a muscle fibre; finally, most neurones in the brain make contact only with other neurones.
mt: 神经元有三种类型：感知神经元的树突与感官细胞接触，例如耳朵中的毛细胞或视网膜中的光敏细胞；运动神经元的轴突与肌纤维接触；最后，大多数大脑中的神经元仅与其他神经元接触。

src: It was Diane who proposed that they should go over and take a look at the labs where Jenner had worked and Reynolds agreed, more than a little relieved that they were returning to the main subject; he was made uncomfortable by Diane's self revelation and the way in which it had begun to erode his easy preconceptions of her and her ‘type’.
mt: "是Diane提出了去看看Jenner曾经工作的实验室的主意，Reynolds同意了，感到有些松了一口气，因为他们正回到主要话题；他因为Diane的自我揭示和这种揭示开始削弱他对她及其“类型”的轻松预期而感到不适。"

src: Tomorrow he would have to make a visit to Penrith to get himself fixed up with some more appropriate clothing for this unsympathetic and unreasonable patch of country.
mt: 明天他必须去皮纳特去换些更合适的衣服，因为这个不感恩、不合理的地方。

src: ‘My unit's a special unit, we do very special work.
mt: “我的单位是一个特别的单位，我们做非常特别的工作。”

src: Er around this period we have the widespread use of things like colour television which has now started to appear in everybody's homes and the beginnings of various holiday programmes.
mt: 在这个时期，我们开始普及像彩色电视这样的物品，它们现在已经出现在每个家庭中，并且开始出现各种各样的节日节目。

src: The firm says it is doing work for IBM in other areas but declined to be more specific, although that suggests that IBM may have taken on board the message that it needs outsiders to run some of its key business units.
mt: 该公司表示在其他领域为IBM工作，但拒绝提供更多细节，尽管这暗示IBM可能已经接受了消息，即它需要外部人士管理一些关键业务单元。

src: If this bit does refer to you, open your eyes, take a look around you, see what's going on and do something.
mt: 如果这个部分指的是你，睁开眼睛，看看四周，看看发生了什么，然后做出反应。

src: I've got a meeting in a few minutes and I —’
mt: 我有几分钟的会议，我——"

src: Furthermore, as the gilded eagle seems poised for take-off to do battle with enemy hordes coming from the south-east, the memorial seems to have anticipated most aptly the events that followed 17 years after its unveiling.
mt: 此外，金鹰似乎准备起飞与南东方来的敌军作战，纪念碑似乎最恰当地预见了17年后揭幕后的事件。

src: Tammuz sat and gnawed his knuckles as Roirbak made the call.
mt: 塔姆穆斯坐着咬着自己的手指，罗伊巴克打电话。

src: And she has failed to take action to limit the damage to her family's image each time scandal has threatened.
mt: "And she has failed to take action to limit the damage to her family's image each time scandal has threatened." 她每当丑闻威胁到她家族的形象时，都没有采取行动来限制损害。

src: So they took a vote — and picked Bernard.
mt: 所以他们进行了投票——并选中了伯纳德。

src: ‘I make no comment on the account of her son, but it does seem that he concealed the fact that his mother was laying for days but it does not affect the cause of death.
mt: “我不对她儿子的情况作任何评论，但似乎他隐瞒了他母亲在几天内一直在准备的事实，但这并不影响死亡的原因。”

src: SIR Allen Sheppard, chairman of Grand Metropolitan, is taking direct action against the Financial Times for its controversial support of Labour on polling day.
mt: "SIR Allen Sheppard, Grand Metropolitan 的主席，正在采取直接行动对抗《金融时报》，因为它在选举日对工党的支持引发了争议。"

src: The reason I shall vote against the motion and for the amendment couldn't have been put more succinctly than it was by Mr , I think Mr made the most pertinent remark that has been made in the debate today, when in opposition to what Mr said about individual freedom he said this is a matter of personal conscience.
mt: "我认为投反对该动议和支持修正案的原因不能更简洁地表达得比Mr.所说的更好。今天的辩论中，Mr.所说的最重要的一句话是，当他反对Mr.关于个人自由的说法时，他说这是个人良心的问题。" Translation: "我认为投反对该动议和支持修正案的原因不能更简洁地表达得比Mr.所说的更好。今天的辩论中，Mr.所说的最重要的一句话是，当他反对Mr.关于个人自由的说法时，他说这是个人良心的问题。"

src: I must say that I am happy to make that statement and in view of some of the things that have been, that have appeared in the media recently here's a statement that needs to be made as for your your your ques , what the, the Chief Constable I welcome the statement and the actions of the Chief Constable on this very concerning issue.
mt: 我必须说，我很高兴能做出这个声明。鉴于最近媒体上出现的一些事情，这里有一个需要发出的声明。至于你的问题，你的，你的，你的“什么”？Chief Constable，我欢迎Chief Constable的声明和行动，这个非常令人担忧的问题。

src: Divided plants will take hold of the soil and grow new roots more quickly if they are replanted so quickly that the plant hardly knows it has been out of the ground.
mt: 分割的植物如果能迅速重新种植到土壤中，它们会更快地扎根并生根，因为植物几乎不知它已经离开了土壤。

src: Feverfew, soapwort, chamomile, wallflower and clove pinks are some to plant in crevices and holes in the wall itself first putting in a little compost for the plant's roots to get a grip on.
mt: "风车草、肥皂草、薄荷、墙花和丁香粉红是一些要在墙缝和洞穴中种植的植物，先在里面放一点堆肥让植物的根系能牢牢扎根。"

src: It's worth mentioning too, that during the year, er, Dr Tim , the general practitioner, who is seconded with er, Social Services, has been doing work on hospital discharge, making sure that the arrangements are, are working, and his reports have been picked up by the respective authorities, and, er, there has er, a sort of action plan has been put together, which is, which is intended to try to improve the er, existing hospital discharge arr arrangement, making sure that people are discharged from hospital and that the er, right type of care is available for them in, in the community.
mt: "值得一提的是，在那一年，医生Tim，兼职与社会服务部门合作，负责医院出院工作，确保安排有效，并且他的报告被相应的当局采纳。除此之外，还制定了一种行动计划，旨在改进现有的医院出院安排，确保患者在社区获得适当的护理。"

src: Malcolm also made that contact when he and Bernie went on a trip up north, searching round textile factories for old fifties cloth to use for making up zoot suits.
mt: 马尔科姆也在他和伯尼去北方旅行时，寻找旧五十年代的布料，用于制作成zoot服装。

src: The villain makes a run for it, knocking over an oil-lamp and setting fire to his evil lair, and the titles drift past a close-up of his silent scream and melting face.
mt: "坏人冲向逃跑，推倒了一盏油灯，点燃了他的邪恶巢穴，标题随着他静默的尖叫和溶化的面孔飞逝。"

src: The gentlemen of the orchestra chorused their usual soft whistles of approval and I did my usual twirl, deep curtsey and, ‘Good evening, gentlemen.’
mt: "乐团的绅士们以他们惯常的柔和哼唱表示赞同，我做了我的常规旋转，深深的鞠躬，并说了‘晚安，绅士们。’"

src: We went on to do a good matinée performance and came off to thunderous applause and whistles of appreciation.
mt: 我们继续了一个精彩的晚间表演，得到了轰动一时的掌声和赞赏的哨声。

src: Which is good news, I mean, from a client, they've got control over whether they keep you going or not.
mt: "这是好消息，意思是，从客户的角度来看，他们有权决定是否让你继续工作。"

src: Simon complains of ‘the unsuitable blue chosen by Mr Serota’ for the Tate's walls and adds: ‘If there is some deep strategy for this marginalisation of the British collection it is certainly making an impact, for there are fewer pictures on view than ever before.’
mt: "史密斯抱怨‘由塞罗塔先生选择的蓝色不适合泰特画廊的墙壁’，并补充道：“如果有某种深层策略来边缘化英国收藏，它肯定在产生影响，因为有更多的画作不再展出。”"

src: It would perhaps be better to concentrate on giving support for the newly elected socialist MPs, and trying to refound a clear sense of what socialism means today.
mt: "可能更好的是专注于为新当选的社会主义议员提供支持，并试图重新定义今天的社会主义含义。"

src: Are you buying from anybody else because can we do a deal on the whole lot?
mt: 你是因为我们能为整个包裹打折而去找别人买吗？

src: In the minds of those who gave positive thought to it, the Commonwealth was to be an organization to which no one who was unwilling need apply, and in which those who had joined were to reach their decisions on the basis of consensus: the goal to be pursued was an uncoerced acknowledgement of Britain as the senior partner in a world-wide enterprise; the position to be sought was the supremely equivocal but potentially supreme satisfying one of primus inter pares .

src: Really we still know very little about what teachers actually do in the classroom and it's all very well standing back in university and saying teachers should do this and should do that, but in order to be able to offer guidance I think we really need to do more research in mixed ability classrooms to discover how teachers at the moment are dealing with the situation and where we might offer them more support, and that's the direction I'd like to see research going; rather than more of the grandiose large-scale quantitative studies, which collect lots of figures and statistics, I'd like to see a lot more studies in actual classrooms looking at actual teachers teaching, looking at what they do and how we can improve that.
mt: 真的，我们还知道课堂上教师的实际工作非常有限。虽然在大学里站在旁边说他们应该这样做，应该那样做，这样的观点很有道理，但我认为我们需要在混合能力的课堂中进行更多的研究，以了解教师目前如何处理这种情况，并确定我们可以为他们提供更多支持的地方。这是我希望研究的方向；而不是更多的大规模、数量化的研究，它们收集大量的数据和统计信息，我更希望看到更多的研究，关注实际的课堂，关注实际的教师，了解他们的工作方式，并探索如何改进。

src: When the controller of a space rocket said recently that the team were going to decide what to do next, he expressed the thought as, ‘We will evaluate the situation in order to make a determination.’

src: According to Willie van Peer's introductory statement, the book is intended to promote a reconciliation between literary and linguistic approaches to the study of literature, and, more specifically, to provide a much-needed contribution in three fundamental directions: first, the development of a theory of textuality which accounts both for the way in which all texts function in society and for the differences between literary and non-literary texts; secondly, the construction of a model of literary communication that gives an adequate account of the complexities involved in the production and reception of literary texts; and thirdly, the development of more explicit and comprehensive accounts of the ways in which formal and contextual factors interact in the process of deriving interpretations from texts.
mt: 根据威利·范·佩尔的介绍，书籍旨在促进文学和语言学方法在文学研究中的和解，并且，特别是，提供三条基本方向的必要贡献：首先，发展一种既能解释所有文本在社会中的功能，又能区分文学和非文学文本的文本性理论；其次，构建一个既能充分描述文学文本的生产和接收复杂性，又能适应文学交流的模型；最后，发展更明确和全面的解释，展示形式和上下文因素在文本解释过程中相互作用的方式。

src: We ran the experiment in 12 sessions of eight subjects each; eight of the sessions involved the eight groups, the remaining four sessions the subjects doing the experiment on an individual basis.
mt: 我们在12次8名参与者的实验中运行了；其中8次涉及8个小组，剩下4次则是个体参与者在实验中独立进行。

src: Although many people do not make such a dramatic move from a very special garden to a flat, most of us leave a few favourite plants behind when we move house, so framing a few of them serves as a lovely reminder of times gone by.
mt: 尽管许多人不做出从一个非常特别的花园到平房的戏剧性转变，但大多数人搬家时都会留下几株最喜欢的植物，以便在新家中悬挂它们，作为美好的回忆。

src: However, care should be taken not to use a professional counsellor as a "fixer" who enables one to avoid doing any real work of one's own.
mt: 不过，务必不要将专业顾问当作“修补者”，让人避免做自己的实际工作。

src: Because they hadn't done any management, Debbie felt Landlords were entitled only to the 10 per cent tenant-finding fee and therefore owed her £2,400 (3 months' rent plus the deposit).
mt: 由于他们没有进行任何管理，Debbie觉得房东只应得10%的租金寻找费，因此欠她2,400英镑（包括3个月的租金和押金）。

src: THERE is no need for Mr Smith to impose taxes on capital or on financial institutions though: his policies look set to do their damage by knocking the most valuable asset owned by most voters — their homes.
mt: 没有必要让Mr. Smith征收资本或金融机构的税收：他的政策似乎会通过打击最受投票者拥有的最有价值资产——他们的房子来造成伤害。

src: Earlier, she had written Letter to the Deaf in which she gave advice to deaf people based on her experiences.
mt: 早些时候，她写了一封给聋人的信，其中她根据自己的经历给聋人们提供了建议。

src: Thirdly, social movements are organised around specific demands such as the need to defend the legality of land-holdings; the desire to get access to water and electricity; or the need to protect human rights.
mt: 第三，社会运动围绕特定的要求组织起来，例如需要保护土地所有权的合法性；渴望获取水电；或需要保护人权。

src: IBM Corp joined with Phoenix Technologies Ltd to license the IBM personal computer BIOS: the program enables OEM customers to access IBM's SurePath PC Standard specification for software compatibility interfaces, and through Phoenix, they will also get access to IBM's Architecture Review Board to extend the SurePath PC standard specification for new technologies and features, the partners said.
mt: IBM公司与凤凰技术有限公司联合出资，获取了IBM个人电脑BIOS的许可：该程序使OEM客户能够访问IBM的SurePath PC标准软件兼容接口，并且通过凤凰公司，他们还将获得访问IBM架构审查委员会，以扩展SurePath PC标准规格以适应新技术和功能，合作伙伴们表示。

src: Consultants told the paper that IBM has been dissecting the two most recent pre-release versions of NT at its Toronto labs to assess the time and money that would be required to do the implementation, and reckon a product could arrive at the turn of the year.
mt: 顾问告诉报纸IBM正在其多伦多实验室分析最近的两次预发布版本的NT，以评估实施所需的时间和成本，并估计产品可能在年底前推出。

src: If you feel that your award is wrong in some way you can ask for the decision to be reviewed or make an appeal — details of how to do this are available from social security benefit offices.
mt: 如果你认为你的奖项有误，请可以要求重新审查决定或提出上诉——有关如何做这些事的详细信息可以在社会保障福利办公室获得。

src: Whilst coping with immediate problems, it was important to take the long-term view.
mt: 尽管处理即时问题，重要的是要保持长期视角。

src: He'd call it doing research.
mt: 他会称之为做研究。

src: Stories were told about how they had actually done considerable damage to some visiting fans when situations had got out of hand.
mt: 故事讲述他们实际上对一些来访的粉丝造成了很大的伤害，当情况变得不堪控制时。

src: The admiral suggested that the revolution was coming to a head and the Shah must order the military to take control.
mt: 海军上将建议革命即将到来高潮，沙皇必须下令军队接管。

src: In one direction the carriage will knit, while in the other the needles will make the tucking movement.
mt: 在一个方向上，马车会缝纫，而在另一个方向上，针子会进行缝纫动作。

src: I'll make a move.
mt: 我会做出一个决定。

src: It's real good when they do the work in the lounge int it Iris?
mt: "真好当他们在休息室里工作时，伊丽莎白吗？"

src: During the succession crisis of 1553, Edward's Roman Catholic sister Mary studiously declined to make any public statement about the possibility of a restoration of papal authority in England.
mt: 在1553年继位危机期间，爱德华的罗马天主教妹妹玛丽学术地拒绝发表任何关于恢复英格兰教会权威的可能性声明。

src: Applied to non-fictional language, this position fails to make an important discrimination.
mt: 在非虚构语言的应用中，这个立场没有做出重要的区分。

src: The Professor, he tells us, was some time in making his appearance, but suddenly the noise and bustle of conversation were stopped by his entrance.
mt: 教授，他告诉我们，他曾经有一段时间准备好出现，但突然他的出现打破了喧闹的谈话。

src: Without such a juxtaposition, you cannot make a rational assessment of twentieth century design.
mt: "没有这种对比，你无法做出对二十世纪设计的理性评估。"

src: The best type for a luxury lawn, these cut with a scissor action to give a good finish.
mt: "奢侈草坪的最佳类型，这些用剪刀动作切割以获得良好的完成度。"

src: Their Anglo-Italian Cup-tie with Ascoli erupted in two minutes of fury — but the Football League will take no action.
mt: "他们与阿斯科利的英意盧甲盃对决在两分钟内爆发出愤怒的狂潮，但足球联赛不会采取任何行动。"

src: Platt made a flying visit to Birmingham yesterday to announce a new sponsorship deal with Brymon European Airways before re-turning to Italy for a Juventus friendly tonight.
mt: 普拉特昨天飞来伯明翰宣布与布里蒙欧洲航空公司新赞助协议后，今晚前往意大利参加尤文图斯友谊赛。

src: OLDHAM made a loss of more than £500,000 last season — their first back in the top flight for more than 60 years.
mt: OLHAM 在上个赛季损失超过 £500,000 — 这是他们自 60 多年来首次回到顶级联赛。

src: Sometimes I will have abandoned a painting, got really tired of it and feel it's not getting anywhere, and you will come and make some remark that makes me look at it again and think: oh yes, I could just pull that one together.
mt: 有时我会放弃一幅画，真的累得不想再继续，觉得它没有进展。然后你会来做一些评论，让我重新审视它，想：哦，真是可以把这件事整起来。

src: No need to be stationary when making a mark.
mt: 不必保持静止状态来留下印记。

src: Irish teams do tour well and it is certain that the new assistant coach Gerry Murphy will improve the quality of Ireland's back play.
mt: 爱尔兰队在巡回赛中表现出色，毫无疑问，新的助理教练盖尔·马里乌斯将会提高爱尔兰队的后卫水平。

src: The Second World War was different from the previous wars in that the Soviets as the occupying power, were imposing their ideology on the people they had taken control of in Eastern Europe.
mt: 第二次世界大战与之前的战争不同之处在于，苏联作为占领国，强加其意识形态给他们控制的东欧人民。

src: And Lady Paignton, whom you met yesterday, is always saying she wished she had somebody to do shopping for her.
mt: "昨天见到的女士帕金顿夫人，常常说她希望有人帮她购物。"

src: They also took their campaign onto the national stage through their participation in the Anti-Nuclear Power Show at the Carnsore Point site.
mt: 他们也将自己的竞选带到了全国舞台，通过在卡恩索尔点核能展览会上参与活动。

src: National Semiconductor made a brave attempt with its LM32900, and the take-over of Fairchild saw the demise of the FSP100.
mt: "国家半导体在其LM32900的大胆尝试中取得了成功，而Fairchild的收购导致了FSP100的衰落。"

src: Ali Idrissi Kaitouni was given a 15-year sentence for writing poems about social injustice and political oppression in Morocco, deemed by the state to constitute a crime against internal security.
mt: 阿里·伊德里西·凯图尼因在摩洛哥写关于社会不公和政治压迫的诗歌而被判处15年徒刑，国家认为这构成了内部安全的犯罪。

src: Whether you are 20 or 80 years-old you can take care of yourself.
mt: 无论你是20岁还是80岁，你都可以照顾自己。

src: Four tries went to flanker Mike Budd , making an impressive return to action after prolonged injury problems.
mt: "四次尝试投给前锋迈克·布德，令人印象深刻地回归比赛，解决了长期的伤病问题。"

src: In an interview after the game he said, ‘In La Rochelle we never start a game with the intention of doing harm.
mt: 在比赛后的采访中他说：“在勒罗瓦尔，我们从不以伤害为目的开始比赛。”

src: He made the comment in remarks to a visiting official from North Korea, one of only a handful of foreign countries to send special delegations for national day.
mt: 他在对北韩访问的官员进行评论时作出了评论，这些官员来自仅有的几个国家之一，派遣特别代表团庆祝国家日。

src: Individuals make their response not as one man islands, but within a framework of family, group, community and national involvements.
mt: 个人们的回应不是孤立的个体，而是在家庭、群体、社区和国家参与的框架内。

src: They are nostalgic rather than expectant, thinking only in terms of God doing a ‘repeat performance’ rather than a new thing.
mt: 他们更是怀旧而不是期待，只有想着上帝会再做一次“重复演出”而不是新的一件事。

src: One suburban Anglican church in Surrey, England discovered on doing this exercise that they had to gain on average thirty-four new members each year just to stay where they were in terms of membership, such was the high level of mobility in their community.
mt: 在苏塞克斯郡的一个郊区圣公会教堂进行这项练习时，他们发现要平均每年招募三十四个新成员才能维持现有的会员人数，这反映了他们社区的高水平流动性。

src: They were kept waiting for four hours before being given clearance to cover the Match of The Century (starring Paul Gascoigne).
mt: 他们被等了四个小时，才被允许参加了百年一遇的比赛（主演保罗·加斯科因）。

src: Nynex Corp's New York Telephone has done a deal with Newbridge Networks Inc for equipment to enable it to offer Nynex Enterprise Services, which provides business customers with private line services whereby with a single telephone call, they can reroute transmissions, add new circuits and raise available bandwidth to set up videoconferences: Newbridge is supplying its 4602 MainStreet Intelligent NetworkStation, 3645 MainStreet High Capacity Bandwidth Manager, and 3624 MainStreet Intelligent Channel Bank.
mt: Nynex Corp的纽约电话公司与Newbridge Networks Inc 签订了一项协议，购买了设备，以便其能够提供Nynex Enterprise Services，这项服务为商业客户提供了私线服务，使他们能够通过单次电话呼叫重定向传输、添加新通道并提高可用带宽以设置视频会议：Newbridge正在供应其4602 MainStreet Intelligent NetworkStation、3645 MainStreet High Capacity Bandwidth Manager和3624 MainStreet Intelligent Channel Bank。

src: LIQUID ASSETS Brian Jordan takes a close look at the increasingly professional wines of England
mt: BRIAN JORDAN 深究英格兰越来越专业的葡萄酒。

src: An angry spokeswoman for Edwardian Hotels said the group was not prepared to make any comment on BCCI.
mt: "一个愤怒的代表，代表埃德华顿酒店集团，表示该集团不愿意对BCCI发表评论。"

src: They were excellent in every aspect and always more than willing to give positive practical advice to allow hotel managers to conduct their business with the backing of a truly professional team.
mt: 他们在每个方面都非常出色，并总是乐于提供积极实用的建议，以便让酒店经理们在一个真正专业团队的支持下进行他们的业务。

src: This is seen as an important means of getting away from the elitist concept and encouraging everyone to take a longer view, even if his or her immediate task involves short-term objectives.
mt: 这被视为摆脱精英主义概念并鼓励每个人都采取更长远的视角，即使他们的即时任务涉及短期目标。

src: We made two hundred and forty five pounds on Thriller of the Year one hundred and nineteen pounds on Tea for Two but that is after we've made the three hundred pounds donation to Whiston Hospital we made a thousand and eighteen pounds on the panto Wuthering Heights we lost four hundred and nine pounds, but that was basically that we do costume plays and have to hire the erm fixtures and set pieces from Wrightsons or wherever we're always going to be in this position and I think it's the tradition of the Garrick that we continue to do them, and I think we have to accept that we may have losses in future on those particular erm things.
mt: 我们在《惊悚之年》上赚了245磅，在《茶与奶》上赚了119磅，但这只是我们向惠斯顿医院捐赠了300磅之后的事。我们在《荒野之泪》上赚了1018磅，但我们损失了409磅，这主要是因为我们做服装剧，需要从Wrightsons或其他地方租借服装和道具。我们总是处于这种位置，我认为这是Garrick传统的一部分，我们必须承认未来可能会有更多的损失。

src: For some reason, although she had not been doing the cooking, this made Lydia feel like Lucretia Borgia.
mt: "出于某种原因，即使她没有做饭，这让莉迪亚感觉像是卢克雷蒂亚·博尔贾。"

src: The ‘target’ of the strike action was undoubtedly the railway undertaking but it was obviously a necessary consequence of the strike's having any effect at all that it should lead to interference in the performance of contracts of carriage.
mt: “‘目标’的打击行动无疑是铁路承运人，但显然，因其产生任何影响而导致合同运输的执行受到干扰的必要后果。”

src: Children aged 5–16 years will be given a 50% reduction on the adult price if sharing a room with an adult.
mt: "5至16岁的孩子将享受与成年人共用卧室时，成人价格的50%折扣。"

src: They will identify and ‘think through’ the issues — or rather do the market analysis that substitutes for political thought — and create the slogans and policies in terms of the conditioned reflexes of the electorate which can be controlled by political advertising on the issues.
mt: 他们将识别并“思考”问题——也就是替代政治思想的市场分析——并基于选民的条件反射创建口号和政策，这些政策可以通过政治广告在这些问题上进行控制。

src: In an amiable parody of an interview he once heard being given by Sir Adrian Boult, Gould spelt out the attitude to recording of that older generation: roughly, ‘I don't mind doing the occasional recording, old boy — not everyone gets to concerts — and we'll do our best, but I don't want any ‘patching’, we must keep the long line intact’.
mt: 在一场温和的讽刺中，Gould 回忆 Sir Adrian Boult 曾经给出的采访，概括了那个年代的录音态度：大致来说，“我不介意偶尔做一些录音，老伙计——不算所有人都能去现场演出——我们会尽力而为，但我不希望任何‘修补’，我们必须保持长线的完整性。”

src: And even during the Second World War er mothers with their children under the age of five er they weren't expected to do any war work at all.
mt: "即使在第二次世界大战期间，年龄在五岁以下的孩子们的母亲们也不被期望做任何战争工作。"

src: She lied to me, though, when I asked at about the age of eight what she'd done: she said she'd worked in an office, done clerical work.
mt: 她在我八岁时问她的事情时说谎了：她说她在办公室工作，做文员工作。

src: Black flowers make a chic choice, especially for a patio, balcony or small garden, where they'd look stunning against a white wall or in a hanging basket.
mt: 黑花是个时尚的选择，尤其适合阳台、露台或小花园，在白墙或悬挂篮子里它们会非常迷人。

src: His opponents, massed in Cable Street, were determined that he should not pass, and 6,000 police were needed to keep order and to make an attempt at clearing the way.
mt: 他的对手，聚集在Cable Street上，决心阻止他前进，6,000名警察被派去维持秩序，并试图清理道路。

src: Joyce described a crowd of three or four hundred blocking the way, shouting, chanting, and giving the clenched fist salute of the ‘Red Front’.
mt: 琼斯描述了一群三四百人堵路，喊叫、唱歌，并举着红色前线的紧握拳头敬礼。

src: Accompanied by Sophia Rahman, he made a most imaginative choice of programme — the surprisingly neglected Schumann A minor Sonata, Dallapiccola's Two Studies and, best of all, Szymanowski's Nocturne and Tarantella.
mt: 伴随着索菲亚·拉曼， 他做出了一个非常有创意的节目选择 — 令人意外地被忽视的舒曼A小调奏鸣曲，达利皮科拉的两部研究，以及最好的 — 西曼诺夫斯基的夜曲和塔兰泰拉。

src: Herbie diverted his gaze to them, whereby they both took a sudden renewed interest in their game.
mt: "赫比转移了他的目光到他们身上，从而他们俩都对他们的游戏产生了新的兴趣。"

src: Even so, both Yanto and Billy found difficulty in hiding their pleasure when, shortly after, the brothers had taken their leave.
mt: 即使如此，Yanto和Billy都难以掩饰他们的兴奋，当他们的兄弟们离开后不久。

src: The girls sat down on a large pew-looking bench in the alcove and laughed at Billy who was standing with his back to the blazing logs doing his knee bending policeman act.
mt: "女孩们坐在一个看起来像大教堂长凳的长凳上，躺在一个角落里，笑着看着Billy，他背对着燃烧的木头，做着警察膝跪的动作。"

src: One would expect some cases to get widespread coverage, especially when there is serious re-offending after a previous life sentence.
mt: "人们会期望一些案件会获得广泛报道，特别是当有人在已经服完刑后重犯时。"

src: Some see it and have sound explanations, like one Magar lady in rural west central Nepal who gave a ten-minute lecture to me on the problems of the transference of fertility from forest to arable land, and changing uses of crop residues with increasing population pressure, that would have stood up well in a graduate seminar.
mt: 有些人看过后能给出合理的解释，就像西中尼尔泊特农村的一个玛加尔女士，她给我讲了一个十分钟的关于森林转移肥沃的困难以及随着人口增加而改变作物残留物使用的演变的讲座，这样的内容在大学研讨会上也会很好地站得住脚。

src: The elderly relatives did what they could but it meant that all through his life — not that he even survived to forty — there was never a chance to take it a bit easier, no one he could rely on to do the work if he was ill or tired.
mt: "老家族尽力了，但这意味着他的一生中——不管他活到多少岁——从未有机会稍微放松一下，没有人他可以依靠来帮忙，如果他生病或疲惫不堪。" Translation Explanation: - "老家族尽力了" (The elderly relatives did their best) - "这意味着" (This means) - "他的一生中" (throughout his life) - "不管他活到多少岁" (no matter how old he lived) - "从未有机会稍微放松一下" (there was never a chance to take it a bit easier) - "没有人他可以依靠" (no one he could rely on) - "如果他生病或疲惫不堪" (if he was ill or tired) - "来帮忙" (to do the work)

src: There are times when Chancellors are right to fuss with mini-measures, and there are times when they need to make an instant impact.
mt: 有时，Chancellors 有必要去烦琐的微小措施，有时他们需要立即产生影响。

src: Mr Heseltine made no comment on the report, which does not form part of the Government's coal review, expected to be published next week.
mt: 赫塞尔廷先生对报告没有任何评论，该报告并不属于政府即将发布的煤炭审查。

src: But he admitted he could not be sure he saw a soldier make contact with another soldier with his rifle.
mt: 但是他说他不能肯定地说他看见一名士兵用他的枪与另一名士兵接触。

src: ‘The reason I agreed to do the film was because of the script and the potential that I thought was there.
mt: “我同意拍这部电影是因为剧本的吸引力和我认为存在的潜力。”

src: It is impossible to make a technical distinction between strategic planning and business planning: both use techniques such as SWOT analysis.
mt: "技术上区分战略规划和商业规划是不可能的：两者都使用SWOT分析等技术。"

src: He then suggests that the former can either directly create the conditions for the reproduction of the relations of production, presumably by quelling any sign of working class insubordination (i.e., a feature of economic practice depends upon political practice), or they can do so indirectly, by establishing a situation in which ideological state apparatuses can do their work (i.e., in which ideological practice determines economic practice).
mt: 他然后建议前者可以直接创造生产关系的再生产条件，可能通过镇压任何形式的工人不服从（即经济实践的特征依赖于政治实践），或者通过间接方式，通过建立一个使意识形态国家机构能够发挥作用的情况（即在这种情况下，意识形态实践决定经济实践）。

src: If holist forms of explanation are to merit serious consideration, they must clearly be based on more than an uncritical acceptance of a crude version of historical materialism, and the claim that they are not threatened by counterfactuals such as those discussed at the start of the chapter must be given a less doctrinaire justification.
mt: 如果要让整体解释方法得到认真考虑，它们必须基于对粗糙历史唯物主义版本的批判性接受，而不是盲目接受，并且声称它们不受反事实论证如开章所讨论的那类的威胁，必须有一个不那么教条的辩护。

src: Here we have a major difference from the historical pessimism of Adorno's negative dialectics which in certain respects poststructuralism might appear to resemble.

mt: 如果马里亚特做出了这个选择，他是因为在1806年从事海军服务多年（虽然不是连续的，但在有工作时），而不是在船舱中写下了多部小说。

src: Marryat — as a writer read by boys, men being already too dulled in the sense at twenty to appreciate him — has probably, through the boys, exercised the greatest influence on the English character that any writer ever did exercise.
mt: "马里亚特 — 作为男孩们阅读的作家，二十岁后男人已经太昏了去欣赏他 — 可能通过男孩们，影响了英格兰的性格，比任何作家都更大。" In this translation, I have used "影响了英格兰的性格" to convey the idea of having a significant influence on the English character, and "比任何作家都更大" to express that Marryat's influence was greater than that of any other writer. The idiomatic expression "二十岁后男人已经太昏了去欣赏他" is used to convey the idea that men, after turning twenty, are too dull to appreciate Marryat.

src: Over supper Gardiner and Foxe explained how a few days earlier Cardinal Campeggio, the Papal Legate had refused to take a decision on the King's petition for a divorce from Queen Catherine of Aragon and had transferred the case to Rome.
mt: 在晚餐上，Gardiner 和 Foxe 解释了几天前，枢机主教卡梅利吉，教皇大使，拒绝做出关于国王请求离婚的凯瑟琳·阿拉贡女王的决定，并将案件转交给罗马。

src: They seem delighted and although so far we have only had telephone contact, I feel sure they will be able to drive their ‘new’ acquisition for many years to come.
